name: /pr-corpus-learn refuses to promote a pattern when the manual quality-eval gate has not produced a pass result
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"gate":"fail"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && printf '[{"id":"p1","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'gate_not_passed' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
